morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 10" over the last week. The whole mountain is basically open. Go explore. Snow is in the cards for the next few days. Enough to freshen things up.

morningBrief.headline: Snow in the Forecast
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 9" over the last week. Snow showers in the forecast with a few inches expected. Conditions should improve.

morningBrief.headline: A Refresh Is Coming
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 8" over the last week. Nearly full mountain access with 142 of 144 trails spinning. Snow is in the cards for the next few days. Enough to freshen things up.

morningBrief.headline: Winter's Coming Back
morningBrief.body: Steady snowfall with 6" over the last week. The whole mountain is basically open. Go explore. The weather models are locked in: 6" of snow heading our way.

morningBrief.headline: Mother Nature Can't Decide
morningBrief.body: 43 trails open, 36 groomed. Rain Snow, temperatures TBD. It's going to be a mixed bag today. Expect rain below and snow above.

morningBrief.headline: Prepare for Pow
morningBrief.body: Zero new inches, but who's complaining? 12" this week means conditions are still prime. A significant storm is brewing with 8" expected over the next few days.
